text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both modestly higher today, with BTC holding $64k and ETH at $1,733, signaling cautious stability rather than conviction. The Fear & Greed index sits at extreme fear with no movement over the week, suggesting sustained uncertainty despite the minor gains, while BTC dominance at 56.3% indicates investors are hedging into altcoins rather than rotating fully into the major pair. Volume at $75B is moderate for this price range, reflecting neither panic liquidation nor aggressive accumulation.
